tokens.headline: Hire Experienced Virtual Legal Staff For Your Firm
tokens.subtext1: Build your team with the best legal staff in the world.
tokens.subtext2: Choose from pre-vetted candidates — start in under 3 days.

attempts.prompt: Create a 16:9 aspect ratio immersive brand background. Base layer: a dark navy #1746A2 overlay over a nighttime aerial cityscape photo (Las Vegas strip). The blue tint is darkest and most saturated along the top edge and the four corners (heavy vignette), thinning across the middle band where warm city lights glow through — those warm amber pinpoints are the photo's own light sources, not palette colors. Treatment: shadows crushed to deep #1746A2, the overall mood dark, moody, atmospheric. A soft darkening vignette frames all edges, pulling focus inward. Cinematic night tone. No text, no logos, high resolution.

Create a 16:9 aspect ratio immersive brand background. Base layer: an extremely high-key, hazy vertical gradient — pure white (#FFFFFF) dominating the top two-thirds, melting into the faintest #BDCFED haze. Almost no saturation; a bright overexposed sky quality with one or two soft white clouds barely visible. Lower element: a desaturated city skyline silhouette sits along the bottom, rendered in pale washed-out #A2C0E6/#BDCFED tones, its tops fading upward into the white haze so the buildings dissolve rather than end on a hard line. Reflective pale floor plane at the very bottom. Soft, bright, foggy, minimal. No text, no logos, high resolution.

You are compositing ONE premium advertising image for a US legal-tech SaaS brand.

You are given a single background image: a finished brand gradient produced in the previous step. Your ONLY job is to place the subject described below onto THAT background and merge the two into one seamless, high-end composition.

═══════════════════════════════════
BACKGROUND — KEEP IT EXACTLY
═══════════════════════════════════
The provided image IS the background. Preserve it exactly as given — same colours, same gradient, same direction, same composition. Do NOT regenerate, recolour, restyle, re-grade, blur, crop, or replace it, and do NOT add any new scenery, rooms, props, furniture, textures, or environment of your own. The background is final. You are only adding the subject.

═══════════════════════════════════
SUBJECT TO ADD
═══════════════════════════════════
A restrained close-up of two hands meeting in a calm handshake, plain navy sleeve and plain white cuff, soft single key light, the rest of the hands and arms dissolving gently into shadow. 90mm macro, f/2.8. Hands centered-low, broad empty space above. Photoreal, matte, premium.

═══════════════════════════════════
SEAMLESS MERGE (most important)
═══════════════════════════════════
- The subject lives directly on the background with NO card, frame, border, rectangle, panel, Polaroid edge, drop shadow, or hard cut-out line.
- Feather the subject's outer edges softly into the background; let the background's colour and light wrap gently onto the subject's shadow side so the two read as a single photograph, never a paste-up or collage.
- Match the subject's lighting direction, colour temperature, contrast, and grain to the background so nothing looks pasted on.
- Respect the placement noted in the subject and keep the background's open / empty areas clear, so a headline and CTA can be added later.

═══════════════════════════════════
FINISH
═══════════════════════════════════
Premium, editorial, cohesive — one unified, thumb-stopping composition with a high-end SaaS feel.

No text, no logos, no watermarks, no readable UI, no readable documents, no nameplates, no captions.

diffs.replace: A restrained close-up of two hands meeting in a calm handshake, plain navy sleeve and plain white cuff, soft single key light, the rest of the hands and arms dissolving gently into shadow. 90mm macro, f/2.8. Hands centered-low, broad empty space above. Photoreal, matte, premium.

warnings: This prompt has no AR tokens — pass dimensions via the API only.
